legal.title: Legal
legal.subtitle: Terms of use and legal notices.
legal.termsDesc: Review the terms governing the use of NotiGym.
legal.termsContent:
1. Purpose
These Terms of Service (ToS) govern the access and use of the NotiGym platform, published by CyberDev-IT. By creating an account, you unconditionally accept these ToS.

2. Registration and account
To access the services, you must create an account by providing accurate and up-to-date information. You are responsible for the confidentiality of your credentials and all activities performed under your account. You must be at least 16 years old to use NotiGym.

3. Services provided
NotiGym is a sports and nutrition tracking platform that allows:
• Tracking personalized workout programs
• Recording body measurements and weigh-ins
• Nutritional tracking (calories, macronutrients)
• Sharing progress via the community
• Storing progress photos

4. Acceptable use
You agree to use NotiGym in compliance with applicable laws. The following are prohibited: identity theft, publishing illegal, offensive, or inappropriate content, any attempt to harm the platform's operations, unauthorized automated use of services.

5. Intellectual property
All elements of NotiGym (logo, design, code, exercise database) are the property of CyberDev-IT. Content you publish remains your property, but you grant NotiGym a license to display it on the platform.

6. Limitation of liability
NotiGym is a tracking tool and does not constitute medical advice. Consult a healthcare professional before starting any sports or nutritional program. CyberDev-IT shall not be held liable for injuries or health problems related to the use of the platform.

7. Service availability
NotiGym strives to ensure continuous availability but does not guarantee uninterrupted operation. Maintenance may be performed without prior notice.

8. Termination
You may delete your account at any time from the security settings. CyberDev-IT reserves the right to suspend or delete an account in case of ToS violation.

9. Modification of ToS
CyberDev-IT reserves the right to modify these ToS. Users will be notified by notification. Continued use constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

10. Applicable law
These ToS are governed by French law. Any dispute shall be submitted to the competent courts.

Last updated: March 2026
legal.privacyPolicyDesc: Learn how we protect your personal data.
legal.privacyPolicyContent:
1. Data controller
The data controller is CyberDev-IT, reachable at support@cyberdev-it.com.

2. Data collected
We collect the following data:
• Registration data: last name, first name, email address, password (encrypted)
• Profile data: height, gender, date of birth, avatar, goals
• Sports data: workout programs, sessions, sets, loads, personal records
• Body data: weight, measurements, body fat percentage, progress photos
• Nutritional data: meals, calories, macronutrients, hydration
• Community data: posts, comments, likes
• Technical data: IP address, browser type, pages visited

3. Processing purposes
Your data is processed to:
• Provide sports and nutrition tracking services
• Personalize your experience
• Enable community interactions
• Improve the platform
• Ensure service security

4. Legal basis
Processing is based on: contract execution (service delivery), your consent (photos, community), legitimate interest (security, service improvement).

5. Data retention
Your data is retained as long as your account is active. Upon account deletion, your data is erased within 30 days, except for data required for legal obligations.

6. Data sharing
Your data is never sold to third parties. It may be shared with: other users (if your profile is public), our technical hosts (secure servers in Europe).

7. Security
We implement technical and organizational measures: password encryption (bcrypt), HTTPS communications, restricted database access, regular backups.

8. Your rights (GDPR)
In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation, you have the rights detailed in the "GDPR Rights" section.

9. Cookies
See our Cookie Policy below.

10. Contact
For any questions: support@cyberdev-it.com

Last updated: March 2026
legal.cookiesContent:
1. What is a cookie?
A cookie is a small text file stored on your device when you visit NotiGym. It allows us to remember your preferences and ensure the proper functioning of the service.

2. Cookies used by NotiGym

Essential cookies (required):
• Authentication token: keeps your session active (localStorage)
• Language preference: remembers your language choice (fr/en)
• Theme preference: remembers your light/dark mode choice

Functional cookies:
• Refresh token: enables automatic session renewal

3. Third-party cookies
NotiGym does not use any third-party cookies, advertising cookies, or third-party analytics trackers. Your browsing is not tracked for advertising purposes.

4. Retention period
• Authentication token: session duration
• Refresh token: 7 days
• Preferences (language, theme): no expiration (localStorage)

5. Cookie management
You can delete cookies through your browser settings. Deleting essential cookies will result in being logged out of your account.

6. Consent
As the cookies used by NotiGym are exclusively essential and functional, they do not require prior consent under the ePrivacy Directive.

Last updated: March 2026
legal.gdprDesc: Exercise your rights to access, modify, and delete your data.
legal.gdprContent:
In accordance with the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR - EU Regulation 2016/679), you have the following rights:

Right of access (Art. 15)
You can obtain a copy of all personal data we hold about you. Use the "Export my data" function below.

Right to rectification (Art. 16)
You can modify your personal data at any time from the "Information" tab of your profile.

Right to erasure (Art. 17)
You can request the complete deletion of your account and all your data from the "Security" tab. Deletion is effective within 30 days.

Right to data portability (Art. 20)
You can retrieve your data in a structured, machine-readable format via the export function.

Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18)
You can request the restriction of processing of your data in certain cases (contesting accuracy, unlawful processing, etc.).

Right to object (Art. 21)
You can object to the processing of your data for legitimate reasons, unless the processing is necessary for the execution of the service.

Right to withdraw consent
When processing is based on your consent, you can withdraw it at any time (e.g., setting your profile to private, deleting your photos).

Exercising your rights
To exercise any of these rights, contact us at support@cyberdev-it.com. We will respond within 30 days.

Complaint to the CNIL
If you believe that the processing of your data is not compliant, you can file a complaint with the Commission Nationale de l'Informatique et des Libertés (CNIL): www.cnil.fr
